Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
